마태복음 1:1.content: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.

마태복음 1:2.content: Abraham became the father of Isaac. Isaac became the father of Jacob. Jacob became the father of Judah and his brothers.

마태복음 1:3.content: Judah became the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar. Perez became the father of Hezron. Hezron became the father of Ram.

마태복음 1:4.content: Ram became the father of Amminadab. Amminadab became the father of Nahshon. Nahshon became the father of Salmon.

마태복음 1:5.content: Salmon became the father of Boaz by Rahab. Boaz became the father of Obed by Ruth. Obed became the father of Jesse.

마태복음 1:6.content: Jesse became the father of King David. David became the father of Solomon by her who had been Uriah’s wife.

마태복음 1:7.content: Solomon became the father of Rehoboam. Rehoboam became the father of Abijah. Abijah became the father of Asa.

마태복음 1:8.content: Asa became the father of Jehoshaphat. Jehoshaphat became the father of Joram. Joram became the father of Uzziah.

마태복음 1:9.content: Uzziah became the father of Jotham. Jotham became the father of Ahaz. Ahaz became the father of Hezekiah.

마태복음 1:10.content: Hezekiah became the father of Manasseh. Manasseh became the father of Amon. Amon became the father of Josiah.

마태복음 1:11.content: Josiah became the father of Jechoniah and his brothers, at the time of the exile to Babylon.

마태복음 1:12.content: After the exile to Babylon, Jechoniah became the father of Shealtiel. Shealtiel became the father of Zerubbabel.

마태복음 1:13.content: Zerubbabel became the father of Abiud. Abiud became the father of Eliakim. Eliakim became the father of Azor.

마태복음 1:14.content: Azor became the father of Zadok. Zadok became the father of Achim. Achim became the father of Eliud.

마태복음 1:15.content: Eliud became the father of Eleazar. Eleazar became the father of Matthan. Matthan became the father of Jacob.

마태복음 1:16.content: Jacob became the father of Joseph, the husband of Mary, from whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.

마태복음 1:17.content: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations; from David to the exile to Babylon fourteen generations; and from the carrying away to Babylon to the Christ, fourteen generations.

마태복음 1:18.content: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was like this: After his mother, Mary, was engaged to Joseph, before they came together, she was found pregnant by the Holy Spirit.

마태복음 1:19.content: Joseph, her husband, being a righteous man, and not willing to make her a public example, intended to put her away secretly.

마태복음 1:20.content: But when he thought about these things, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream, saying, “Joseph, son of David, don’t be afraid to take to yourself Mary, your wife, for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Spirit.

마태복음 1:21.content: She shall give birth to a son. You shall name him Jesus, for it is he who shall save his people from their sins.”

마태복음 1:22.content: Now all this has happened that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the Lord through the prophet, saying,

마태복음 1:23.content: “Behold, the virgin shall be with child, and shall give birth to a son. They shall call his name Immanuel;” which is, being interpreted, “God with us.”

마태복음 1:24.content: Joseph arose from his sleep, and did as the angel of the Lord commanded him, and took his wife to himself;

마태복음 1:25.content: and didn’t know her sexually until she had given birth to her firstborn son. He named him Jesus.
